title: MCLN EX02 MHE oLPN Adjustment Configuration Guide
fullText:
﻿ EX02 – MHE oLPN Adjustment Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u EX02 Inbound MHE Configurations PAGEREF _Toc42773608 \h 4 1.1 Navigate to End Point List PAGEREF _Toc42773609 \h 4 1.2 Add End Point PAGEREF _Toc42773610 \h 4 1.3 Select Machines/Clusters PAGEREF _Toc42773611 \h 4 1.3.1 Start End Point PAGEREF _Toc42773612 \h 5 1.4 Navigate to System Codes PAGEREF _Toc42773613 \h 5 1.5 Adjust SysCode S-408 Maximum Code Length to 15 PAGEREF _Toc42773614 \h 5 1.6 Add Message Type in SysCode S-408 PAGEREF _Toc42773615 \h 6 1.7 Add MHE Message Format field name in B905 SysCode PAGEREF _Toc42773616 \h 6 1.7.1 Add SysCode ID’s for User ID, oLPN Number, Item Name, Quantity PAGEREF _Toc42773617 \h 6 1.8 Add MHE Message Formats for MHE OLPNADJUST PAGEREF _Toc42773618 \h 7 1.8.1 Add Message Format PAGEREF _Toc42773619 \h 7 1.8.2 Add Message Format Details PAGEREF _Toc42773621 \h 8 1.9 Add End Point config in MHE Configuration PAGEREF _Toc42773622 \h 9 1.10 Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX02 Extension Control, and C-E02EX02 Default Adjustment Reason Code PAGEREF _Toc42773623 \h 10 1.11 Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master PAGEREF _Toc42773624 \h 13 1.12 MHE Sample Message: PAGEREF _Toc42773625 \h 14 EX02 Inbound MHE Configurations Follow below steps to configure IB MHE oLPN Adjustment Navigate to End Point List Add End Point Configure Port per business need Select Machines/Clusters Click Save Start End Point Navigate to System Codes Adjust SysCode S-408 Maximum Code Length to 15 Open System Codes UI, filter for Code Type 408, change maximum code length to 15, save Add Message Type in SysCode S - 408 Add new code id OLPNADJUS T. Select System Code S-408 in the above step, then select Code IDs. After Code IDs load, select Add, and input the below information Add MHE Message Format field name in B905 SysCode Add SysCode ID’s for User ID, oLPN Number, Item Name, Quantity . In System Codes UI, filter for Code Type 905, then select S-905, and select Code IDs. Select Add and input the information below. Add MHE Message Formats for MHE OLPNADJUST Add Message Format – open MHE Message Formats UI, select Add, input below information Add Message Format Details In MHE Message Formats UI, Select the Message Type you created in previous step, and select MHE Message Format Details in bottom right. Create in same sequence as shown below. Add End Point config in MHE Configuration Select Add and input the information based on business need. Select your record and Select End Point Config Select add and select configured End Point as Event ID Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control , C-000-EX02 Extension Control , and C-E02 EX02 Default Adjustment Reason Code Open System Codes UI, select Add and input the above information. Select Parameters Select Code IDs C-E02-EX02 Default Adjustment Reason Code Parameter Configuration System Code Configuration Parameter Configuration – make sure th e reason code configured in this byte is set up with On Inventory Shortage à “Cancel Shortage Requirement” B-051 System Code Configuration Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master Message Master UI, select + sign to add new message and configure per below (Text values in EX02 Extension Spec as well) MHE Sample Message:

[Document: MCLN EX02 MHE oLPN Adjustment Configuration Guide]

EX02 – MHE oLPN Adjustment Contents  EX02 Inbound MHE Configurations  1.1 Navigate to End Point List  1.2 Add End Point  1.3 Select Machines/Clusters  1.3.1 Start End Point  1.4 Navigate to System Codes  1.5 Adjust SysCode S-408 Maximum Code Length to 15  1.6 Add Message Type in SysCode S-408  1.7 Add MHE Message Format field name in B905 SysCode  1.7.1 Add SysCode ID’s for User ID, oLPN Number, Item Name, Quantity  1.8 Add MHE Message Formats for MHE OLPNADJUST  1.8.1 Add Message Format  1.8.2 Add Message Format Details  1.9 Add End Point config in MHE Configuration  1.10 Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control, C-000-EX02 Extension Control, and C-E02EX02 Default Adjustment Reason Code  1.11 Error Message Configuration – Messages UI, select Message Master  1.12 MHE Sample Message:  EX02 Inbound MHE Configurations Follow below steps to configure IB MHE oLPN Adjustment Navigate to End Point List Add End Point Configure Port per business need Select Machines/Clusters Click Save Start End Point Navigate to System Codes Adjust SysCode S-408 Maximum Code Length to 15 Open System Codes UI, filter for Code Type 408, change maximum code length to 15, save Add Message Type in SysCode S - 408 Add new code id OLPNADJUS T. Select System Code S-408 in the above step, then select Code IDs. After Code IDs load, select Add, and input the below information Add MHE Message Format field name in B905 SysCode Add SysCode ID’s for User ID, oLPN Number, Item Name, Quantity . In System Codes UI, filter for Code Type 905, then select S-905, and select Code IDs. Select Add and input the information below. Add MHE Message Formats for MHE OLPNADJUST Add Message Format – open MHE Message Formats UI, select Add, input below information Add Message Format Details In MHE Message Formats UI, Select the Message Type you created in previous step, and select MHE Message Format Details in bottom right. Create in same sequence as shown below. Add End Point config in MHE Configuration Select Add and input the information based on business need. Select your record and Select End Point Config Select add and select configured End Point as Event ID Add C-000-000 Global Extension Control , C-000-EX02 Extension Control , and C-E02 EX02 Default Adjustment Reason Code Open System Codes UI, select Add and input the above information.
